inputs.label: Initial Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the rocket at launch, including propellant (wet mass).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of the rocket at launch, including propellant (wet mass).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fırlatma anında roketin toplam kütlesi (yakıt dahil, ıslak kütle).

inputs.label: Final Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the rocket after propellant is expended (dry mass).

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the rocket after propellant is expended (dry mass).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt tükendikten sonra roketin kütlesi (kuru kütle).

inputs.label: Specific Impulse
inputs.businessContext: Engine efficiency: thrust per weight flow rate of propellant at Earth's surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Engine efficiency: thrust per weight flow rate of propellant at Earth's surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor verimliliği: Dünya yüzeyinde itme kuvvetinin yakıt ağırlık debisine oranı.

inputs.label: Standard Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity, used to convert specific impulse to exhaust velocity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceleration due to gravity, used to convert specific impulse to exhaust velocity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerçekimi ivmesi, özgül itkiyi egzoz hızına dönüştürmek için kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
